hasAttributes.name: annotationId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the note.

hasAttributes.name: objectTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: Type of entity with which the note is associated.

hasAttributes.name: owningUser
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who owns the note.

hasAttributes.name: objectId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the object with which the note is associated.

hasAttributes.name: objectIdTypeCode
hasAttributes.description: The name of the entity linked by objectId

hasAttributes.name: owningBusinessUnit
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the business unit that owns the note.

hasAttributes.name: subject
hasAttributes.description: Subject associated with the note.

hasAttributes.name: isDocument
hasAttributes.description: Specifies whether the note is an attachment.

hasAttributes.name: noteText
hasAttributes.description: Text of the note.

hasAttributes.name: mimeType
hasAttributes.description: MIME type of the note's attachment.

hasAttributes.name: langId
hasAttributes.description: Language identifier for the note.

hasAttributes.name: documentBody
hasAttributes.description: Contents of the note's attachment.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the note was created.

hasAttributes.name: fileSize
hasAttributes.description: File size of the note.

hasAttributes.name: fileName
hasAttributes.description: File name of the note.

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the note.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who last modified the note.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the note was last modified.

hasAttributes.name: versionNumber
hasAttributes.description: Version number of the note.

hasAttributes.name: ownerId
hasAttributes.description: Owner Id

hasAttributes.name: ownerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of owner, either User or Team.

hasAttributes.name: stepId
hasAttributes.description: workflow step id associated with the note.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the data import or data migration that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the annotation.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the delegate user who last modified the annotation.

hasAttributes.name: owningTeam
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the team who owns the note.

definitions.description: Note that is attached to one or more objects, including other notes.
